hero_subtitle: Caring, experienced grooming for dogs and cats. We treat every pet like family.
about_title:
Passionate about pets.
Professional in every detail.
about_body: We are dedicated to providing the highest quality grooming experience for your dogs and cats. Every appointment is handled with patience, care, and a genuine love for animals of all breeds and temperaments.
about_quote: Every pet that walks through our door gets treated with love and care.
area_subtitle: We serve clients throughout the greater Phoenix metropolitan area. Contact us to confirm availability in your neighborhood.
cta_subtitle: Contact us today and we'll take care of everything.

services_preview.name: Full Groom
services_preview.description: Bath, dry, cut, nail trim, ear cleaning — everything your pet needs in one visit.

services_preview.name: Bath & Brush
services_preview.description: Full bath, blow dry, and thorough brush out. Perfect for regular maintenance.

services_preview.name: Cat Grooming
services_preview.description: Specialized gentle grooming for cats of all breeds and temperaments.

services_preview.name: Nail Trim & Buffing
services_preview.description: Quick and stress-free nail trimming for dogs and cats. Walk-ins welcome.

services_preview.name: Puppy Groom
services_preview.description: Gentle first-time grooming experience designed for young puppies.

services_preview.name: Deshed Treatment
services_preview.description: Specialized treatment to dramatically reduce shedding.
